Why UDIZINE?

The exclusive UDIZINE concept allows U to DIZINE the ideal display solution using either one system or combining one or more systems for a unique display and full store solution. We innovate it, U DIZINE it!

Please find all the Installation Instructions you need for installation on the Assembly Instructions page.
We are available to answer any questions you may have at customer service or 732-790-0752

About us

Our Clients

Learn more

Testimonials

Abe Chehebar | AHQ-Accessory Headquarters

Working with UDIZINE's design team was a joy, they were patient and accommodating. They were able to provide me with an exact design of what my showroom was going to look like before I purchased it. The products work well for my showrooms needs and I am very happy with the final results. I highly recommend UDIZINE and its products

Brett MacFarland | Long Lake Marine

We upgraded our retail space this off-season, installing the vertik systems. Super easy installation, and great design process with Udizine's team. Shipping was also super quick. Very happy with our improved space!

Anastasia | Fitness

We created a cube for directional signage. Our client changed her mind from using a cable system at the last minute and wanted ceiling rods for better stability. UDIZINE’s customer service representative, was able to have our order expedited promptly, and certainly helped us make our client happy!

Retail Display Fixtures

If you are looking for innovative, smart, and modern retail display fixtures, UDIZINE has the perfect and widest collection for you. We have been working in partnership with the retailers for over 20 years and providing display solutions that will enhance their customers’ experience and increase sales.

Retail Display Fixtures for Modern Stores

Retailers looking for modern retail shelving or retail wall display always rely on our off-the-shelf display essentials and customized shop fittings. Not only base units, but you also get choices in types of shelves to go with the décor of your shop as well.

Retail Display Fixtures for Every Store

Our state-of-the-art modular retail display fixtures are flexible both visually and functionally. You can choose a single unit and then modify it or add on the next units as and when needed. We offer Vertik store fixtures systems that are great for maximizing your wall space, just the way you want. Almost any type of product, from clothes to jewelry, fashion accessories, sports items, or delicate electronic items can be intelligently displayed on these systems.

Stylish and Contemporary Retail Display Store Fixtures

In Vertik systems, you can choose wall-mounted shelving in different colors and with varying numbers of shelves in different configurations. The glass or wooden shelves and all other accessories to fit these display fixtures are also available with us. Simply by exploring our online store, you will have ample ideas to choose the right items for your retail store. All modern retail wall systems including, Vertik system,  Palo system, Cable system, Tube system, or SlatStrip are available with us. UPS shipping ensures reliable and speedy delivery.

Retail Display Fixtures are Dynamic and Flexible

In our collection of modern store fixtures, you get components that can be mixed and matched to create a contemporary and dynamic store interior. You can mix shelving, hanging, and signage all at the same time and capture the attention of your buyers. Also, these can be reconfigured and adjusted any time you want. So, change the display systems every month, on weekends or seasonally, and keep inviting onlookers to come inside and have a better look at your products.

Retail Display Fixtures for Small Spaces

Retailers often face the challenge of displaying a large number of items in a small space, without making the place crowded or haphazard. UDIZINE has some great solutions for them: retail wall display systems that can run from ceiling to floor. If you are looking for such unique yet affordable modern retail store fixtures talk to our team today.

Display Fixtures at Discounted Price

UDIZINE offers great display fixtures at a discounted price making the proposition even more attractive. You may browse through our online catalog for display fixtures and talk to us for the best deals.

877-240-6149
